interactions.summary: Asked what he is allowed to say and whether he is a spy, Jiang distinguishes abstract speculation from naming incriminating specifics, then explains his China freedom as a foreigner outside the Chinese citizen-control system.
interactions.speaker_attribution: Interview exchange: SPEAKER_00 is host Jack Neel or ad read; SPEAKER_01 is Jiang unless noted.

speaker_notes.note: Diarization is consistent enough for this packet: SPEAKER_00 carries host questions, intro, outro, or sponsor reads; SPEAKER_01 carries Jiang answers. Sponsor ad segments are not Jiang claims.

claims.claim: Jiang says abstract analysis of secret societies is tolerated, but naming powerful individuals with incriminating specifics or revealing confidential-source information would trigger retaliation.
claims.temporal_scope: Self-positioning and risk model stated on 2026-04-15.

claims.claim: Jiang says he is allowed to speak in China because he is a foreign English teacher outside the Chinese citizen bureaucracy and AI surveillance grid, as long as he avoids Chinese social media, public speeches, Chinese reporters, and local monetization.

signature_moments.moment: China's surveillance grid is aimed at collective networks, not random foreign teachers outside the system.
signature_moments.source_phrase: you're not interested in individual behavior. You're interested in collective behavior.
signature_moments.why_it_matters: It clarifies his theory of Chinese control.

signature_moments.moment: He chooses freedom by refusing lucrative Chinese fame.
signature_moments.source_phrase: I choose freedom, but I also choose not to engage in lucrative opportunities in China
signature_moments.why_it_matters: This is the personal tradeoff behind his public role.

glossary_terms.definition_or_usage: The data system Jiang says profiles Chinese citizens and their social networks through ID and payment infrastructure.
The tolerated position Jiang says foreign teachers occupy in China.

chronology_notes.note: This is a dated 2026 explanation of Jiang's operating status in China.

uncertainty_notes.note: Packet includes host sponsor/ad material; semantic claims should not treat ad copy as Jiang's argument.
